# Loqara

> Loqara is an AI chat & voice agent for modern e-commerce stores. It answers customer questions from your own knowledge base, searches your product catalog, looks up orders, captures leads, and hands conversations off to a human — all embedded with one line of code. Supports English and Lithuanian.

## What it does
- AI chat agent grounded in your own content (no made-up answers)
- Real-time voice agent (optional add-on)
- Product search and order-status lookup against your store
- Lead capture during conversations
- Live human handoff from a shared inbox, on every plan
- Conversation analytics and CSAT
- One-line `<script>` embed — live in minutes, no engineers

## Pricing (EUR per month, billed monthly or annually)
- Free — €0 — 100 conversations/mo, 1 bot, English, live handoff, basic analytics
- Starter — €149 — 1,500 conversations/mo, 2 bots, all languages, lead capture, product search & order lookup, remove Loqara badge
- Growth — €249 — 4,000 conversations/mo, up to 5 bots, priority support, advanced analytics
- Scale — €449 — 12,000 conversations/mo, unlimited bots, teams & roles, custom data retention, priority SLA
- Voice agent add-on — €49/mo including ~200 minutes, then €0.20/min
- No setup fee. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

## Channels
- Website chat widget today
- WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger — coming soon
